changes.comment: ai-assist: unify the turn entry points (callProviderCompletion, callProviderCompletionStream, generateJsonCompletion, executeClientToolTurn, and the proxy variants) onto a single ordered { system?, messages } request shape (IChatRequest), eliminating the head/tail history-ordering asymmetry. BREAKING on the active ai-assist surface: replaces { prompt, additionalMessages } / { prompt, messagesBefore }; AiPrompt gains toRequest(); proxy wire body now sends { system, messages } instead of { prompt, additionalMessages/messagesBefore }.
